{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211203019AE7C22EB606EC4D14AD"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7572921575289701145","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"呜呜呜，番茄终于有 我的朋友很少 的剧情了，好冷门啊，可以再来个大河吗[哭][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763210193,"group_id":"7566493889733856318","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"宅","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NweVSyDXPyAwPLqtuBAUgdlCDlhqAZWihryDOR7AOKB6","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f945e23fe9ab43b9ab01d712c828a708~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622011&x-signature=3%2BLsFwLNBoU3P39xbWLkWR5BEl8%3D","user_id":"2036736184827102","user_name":"艾霜鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2036736184827102","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7566493889733856318","book_info":{"abstract":"神崎悠人醒来时，发现自己身处一个奇妙的二次元世界。更糟的是，他不仅要照顾重度家里蹲的义妹纱雾，还要应付从天而降的合法萝莉山田妖精，以及突然回归的小尾巴土间埋。
当叶征发现自己被一群性格迥异的妹妹们包围时，他的人生彻底乱了套。最可怕的是，他的监护人兼班主任平冢静似乎也对他图谋不轨？
"你们都是我的好妹妹！"叶征试图维持最后的理智。
"才不是妹妹呢！"众少女异口同声地反驳。
这是一个关于记忆、选择和被妹妹们包围的青春恋爱喜剧。当青梅竹马遇上监护人，当傲娇遇上腹黑，叶征的日常将何去何从？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8ee38cc6dc6c86142dbf206c87d80017~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"帕拉塞","author_id":"","book_id":"7566493889733856318","book_name":"综漫：穿越者的咸鱼生活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3547人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7566500354825650750","read_count":"3547","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"769054"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"362","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,综漫,轻小说,穿越,二次元,腹黑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d3a9f542fd1c09d6026c53f69e02b00c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779249781&x-signature=UXAYNKDr2shAmqdW4iKb4FqjxDo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"364651165780179","extra":{"com
